name: Sangria El Tampa
recipeInstructions:
1. Save as much pulp from the fresh squeezed citrus as possible to include in the sangria.
2. Heat the water to a slow boil, then add the sugar (if using EQUAL (tm), do not do this step). Melt the sugar in the boiling water.
3. Add the fruit juices and remove from heat. Allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Add wine, citrus pulp, spices, and stir.
5. Chill and serve with thin slices of fruits floating in the bowl.
